MfeBuildConfig.description: Per-MFE build customizations, keyed by MFE application name.

extra_slot_files.description: Files injected from the slot config into the MFE root before building. A plain string copies a file as-is, or use 'source:dest' to rename on copy; a mapping selects the source by release name.
extra_slot_files.title: Extra Slot Files

extra_npm_bundles.description: Pre-built npm bundles to pack and copy as static assets. Each entry has the form 'npm_package_spec|target_directory'.
extra_npm_bundles.title: Extra Npm Bundles

MfeBuildConfig.title: MfeBuildConfig

SlotFileByRelease.description: A slot file whose source filename is selected by Open edX release name.

dest.description: Destination filename, relative to the MFE build root.
dest.title: Dest

by_release.description: Map of release name to source filename in the slot config. The 'default' key is the fallback used when no release matches.
by_release.title: By Release

SlotFileByRelease.title: SlotFileByRelease

description: Top-level schema for an operator's legacy MFE ``build_config.yaml``.

styles.description: Per-deployment stylesheet override copied into the MFE root, keyed by deployment name; the value is a filename in the slot config.
styles.title: Styles

mfes.description: Per-MFE customizations keyed by MFE application name.
mfes.title: Mfes

title: BuildConfig
